headline.text: L3 Truffle Line mixer agitator has a *missing connecting part* — waiting on maintenance since 06:09, no ETA.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Sollich 2 cleared ATP test failures in tunnels 2, 3, metal detector, and C1 by 06:56 after belt washing and cleaning. SL3 kitchen steam pipe leak was patched at 13:55 yesterday, but a second leak from the tee requires a longer pipe not in stock — steam shut off, part pickup scheduled today.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ran routine operations across ML2 and ML3 with no production issues. Scheduling adjusted FFS start to second shift today due to low HER caramel inventory.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 was down 38 minutes at 06:05 dialing depositor 4 weights, cleared by draining and refilling hoppers at 06:43. A mold jam and lifting table alarm were cleared within minutes. TG#5 belt ripped at 07:06 — operators washing replacement belt. ML1 has two burnt-out pumps locked out for replacement, inclusion mixer water temp unstable and failing as of 07:10, and procedural flags on heating left on and wet molds in storage. Truffle Line mixer agitator stopped — connecting part missing, waiting on maintenance since 06:09.

resolved.title: ATP test failures on Sollich 2 front and rear sections
resolved.summary: ATP tests failed in tunnels 2 and 3, metal detector, and C1; belt washing and cleaning performed.
resolved.resolution: All tests passed at 06:56 — "All tests passed and everything sanitized" (S2 Enrober).

resolved.title: ML4 depositor 4 weight dialing, 38 minutes down
resolved.summary: QA could not dial target weight on depositor 4 even after adjusting settings way out of centerline; drained inclusion hopper and depositors to restart.
resolved.resolution: Started back up at 06:43 after draining and refilling hoppers — "We started back up" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam after depositor 4
resolved.summary: Mold jammed downstream of depositor 4, cleared by hand.

resolved.title: ML4 depositor 4 lifting table position alarm
resolved.summary: Lifting table position alarm triggered on depositor 4; maintenance called, issue traced to recipe setting reverting to old value.
resolved.resolution: Started back up at 06:57 — setting corrected and saved to recipe, "the setting that Chiara changed last week went back to the old setting, new setting is now saved" (Itzel Chavez).

needs_attention.title: SL3 kitchen steam pipe leak at tee
needs_attention.summary: First steam pipe leak patched yesterday at 13:55, but second leak found at top of tee; longer replacement pipe not in stock, steam shut off.
needs_attention.status: Steam shut off as of 13:55 yesterday, part pickup scheduled for this morning.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Line mixer agitator connecting part missing
needs_attention.summary: Mixer auger internal agitator not rotating despite motor running; connecting piece between motor and agitator appears missing, not found during search.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 06:09, part not located as of 06:20, waiting on maintenance review.

needs_attention.title: ML1 two burnt-out pumps locked out for replacement
needs_attention.summary: Both pumps burnt out, locked out and tagged; maintenance replacing.
needs_attention.status: Locked out at 05:55, Nathan Ruiz replacing, no completion reported.

needs_attention.title: ML1 heating left on while depositor removed
needs_attention.summary: Heating left on again during depositor removal, emphasized as recurring procedural violation.
needs_attention.status: Raised at 06:06, Chad Stone connecting on issue at 06:17.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG#5 belt ripped, replacement in progress
needs_attention.summary: TG#5 belt ripped, line down at start of shift; operators washing new belt for installation.
needs_attention.status: Belt being washed for replacement as of 07:06, no installation ETA.

needs_attention.title: ML1 inclusion mixer water temp unstable, failing
needs_attention.summary: Inclusion mixer water temp low at 07:06, temperature fluctuating up and down, failed again at 07:10.
needs_attention.status: Temp unstable and failing as of 07:10, no resolution or maintenance response.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG4 door bent from mishandling
needs_attention.summary: TG4 door bent from the exact mishandling issue discussed and walked a couple weeks ago.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 04:59, procedural reminder issued, no repair status.

needs_attention.title: ML1 water flow meter float down during startup
needs_attention.summary: Step 8 of startup checklist requires water flow meter float up, but float is down; maintenance reviewing.

needs_attention.title: ML1 molds stored wet and dirty in tote
needs_attention.summary: Molds in storage tote are wet and dirty, housekeeping and quality concern.
